title: partition by key distribute unbalance when PARTITIONS is even and some COLLATE
description:
Used PARTITION BY KEY to create partition table, when the KEY columns
PARTITIONS is even number and table CHARSET=utf8mb4 and
COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci or utf8mb4_general_ci, data distribute unbalance, when PARTITIONS is
odd number ,data uniform distribution.
How to repeat:
First, create two partition tables.

mysql>CREATE TABLE `tp1` (
  `s1` char(32) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`s1`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci
PARTITION BY KEY (s1)
PARTITIONS 10;

mysql>CREATE TABLE `tp2` (
  `s1` char(32) NOT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`s1`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_general_ci
PARTITION BY KEY (s1)
PARTITIONS 11 ;

Then, load data:

mysql>insert into tp1(s1)
SELECT
  @counter := @counter+1 AS counter 
FROM
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select1,
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select2,
  (
    SELECT 
      @counter := -1
    FROM
      DUAL
  ) AS select_counter
;

mysql>insert into tp2(s1)
SELECT
  @counter := @counter+1 AS counter 
FROM
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select1,
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select2,
  (
    SELECT 
      @counter := -1
    FROM
      DUAL
  ) AS select_counter
;

mysql>insert into tp2(s1)
SELECT
  @counter := @counter+1 AS counter 
FROM
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select1,
  (
    SELECT 
      NULL
    FROM
      INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
    LIMIT 600
  ) AS select2,
  (
    SELECT 
      @counter := -1
    FROM
      DUAL
  ) AS select_counter
;

Then, check data distribute.

mysql> select
    -> partition_name,data_length from information_schema.partitions where
    -> table_schema='test' and table_name='tp1';
+----------------+-------------+
| partition_name | data_length |
+----------------+-------------+
| p0             |     8962048 |
| p1             |       98304 |
| p2             |     8962048 |
| p3             |      131072 |
| p4             |     8962048 |
| p5             |       98304 |
| p6             |     8962048 |
| p7             |      114688 |
| p8             |     8962048 |
| p9             |      114688 |
+----------------+-------------+
10 rows in set (0.00 sec)

mysql> select partition_name,data_length from information_schema.partitions where table_schema='test' and table_name='tp2';
+----------------+-------------+
| partition_name | data_length |
+----------------+-------------+
| p0             |       16384 |
| p1             |       16384 |
| p2             |       16384 |
| p3             |       16384 |
| p4             |       16384 |
| p5             |       16384 |
| p6             |       16384 |
| p7             |       16384 |
| p8             |       16384 |
| p9             |       16384 |
| p10            |       16384 |
+----------------+-------------+
11 rows in set (0.00 sec)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tp3 (s1 VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, s2 INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (s1, s2)) PARTITION BY RANGE (hash(s1)) (PARTITION p0 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 0), PARTITION p1 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 1), PARTITION p2 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 2), PARTITION p3 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 3), PARTITION p4 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 4), PARTITION p5 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 5), PARTITION p6 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 6), PARTITION p7 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 8, REMAINDER 7));

CREATE TABLE tp4 (s1 VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, s2 INT NOT NULL, PRIMARY KEY (s1, s2)) PARTITION BY RANGE (hash(s1)) (PARTITION p0 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 0), PARTITION p1 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 1), PARTITION p2 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 2), PARTITION p3 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 3), PARTITION p4 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 4), PARTITION p5 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 5), PARTITION p6 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 6), PARTITION p7 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 7), PARTITION p8 FOR VALUES WITH (MODULUS 9, REMAINDER 8));
INSERT INTO tp3 (s1, s2) SELECT CONCAT('value', counter), FLOOR(RANDOM() * 100) FROM generate_series(1, 600) AS counter;
INSERT INTO tp4 (s1, s2) SELECT CONCAT('value', counter), FLOOR(RANDOM() * 100) FROM generate_series(1, 600) AS counter;
SELECT partition_name, pg_total_relation_size('tp3') FROM pg_partitions WHERE schemaname = 'public' AND tablename = 'tp3';
key_bug_features: Data distribution unbalance with even partitions and specific collations
